title: The simple one
description: A simple modpack with ( almost ) vanilla create
body:
![Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d234b9f4122d19be0d66017559913d1450eacaa_0.webp)
^ A modpack as simple as cobblestone! :)

**Clean, focused vanilla+ experience built around Create & Quark.**  
No minimaps. No 1,000,000+ mechanics. Just pure building, automation, and cozy vibes.

## Why this one?

I believe Minecraft is at its best when it stays simple.  
That’s why this modpack revolves entirely around **Create** — the best engineering mod ever made — combined with **Quark** for gentle vanilla-friendly tweaks.  
Everything else is carefully chosen to support Create without overwhelming you.

Recipe addons smooth out progression, decorative mods give you nice-looking blocks and furniture, and a handful of performance mods + **Distant Horizons** + **Oculus** shaders make the world look gorgeous while running buttery smooth.

That’s it. No bloat. No distractions. Just you and your contraptions.

## ✨ Core Features

- **Create-first gameplay** — all the fun of factories, trains, windmills and mechanical power without extra tech trees
- **Quark QoL** — the little things that should have been in vanilla (but better)
- **Curated Create addons** — only the ones that feel like natural extensions
- **Recipe tweaks** — smarter crafting paths so you spend more time building and less time grinding
- **Cozy decoration** — beautiful furniture, farming, chimneys and extra blocks that fit perfectly into Create factories
- **Lightweight & optimized** — runs great even on mid-range PCs

**No minimap. No quest book. No 500 new dimensions.**  
Just Minecraft the way it was meant to be — with Create magic.

## Featured Mods

- **Create**  
- **Quark**  
- Create Copycats+  
- Create Bits and Bobs  
- Create Aquatic Ambitions  
- Create Deco  
- Create Extra  
- Farmers Delight  
- Supplementaries  
- Another Furniture  
- Sooty Chimneys  
- Vista  
- Oculus (shaders)  
…and many, many more quality-of-life, recipe, decoration, performance and visual mods.

Perfect for:  
* Create enthusiasts who want focused gameplay  
* Builders who love factories that actually look good  
* Players tired of 300-mod kitchen-sink packs

![down fade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e93fc640097350ee45cc361f63ab917d18afcbb6.png)
